title: epacris refulgens
intro: Epacris refulgens, also known as the Scarlet Heath Midge, is a type of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae native to the southeastern regions of Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Epacris refulgens include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Epacris refulgens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe sore throats and ease congestion.
